title: Left join preload on belongs_to + filter
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.published_posts_with_authors/0` that returns published posts with their author preloaded via join-preload (because `belongs_to :author` is single-row, join-preload is appropriate). Filter `published: true`. Use `left_join: u in assoc(p, :author)` and thread the binding into `preload: [author: u]`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Reinforces the belongs_to preload policy + binding threading. Nuanced enough to be medium.
